nl_query: Show all scripts where the primary evaluator has frozen the attempt, a review evaluator has been assigned, but the review attempt has not yet started, including the primary evaluator name, review evaluator name, and board code.
failed_sql:
SELECT ea.id AS attempt_id, ea.script_id, ea.attempt_type, ea.total_marks, ea.frozen_at, au.display_name AS primary_evaluator_name, rvau.display_name AS review_evaluator_name, b.code AS board_code
FROM   evaluation_attempt ea
JOIN   app_user au ON au.id = ea.evaluator_user_id
JOIN   script_assignment sa ON sa.evaluator_id = au.employee_id AND sa.script_id = ea.script_id
JOIN   academic_unit au ON au.id = sa.board_id AND au.unit_type = 'COURSE'
JOIN   board b ON b.id = sa.board_id
JOIN   evaluation_attempt rvea ON rvea.parent_attempt_id = ea.id AND rvea.attempt_type = 'REVIEW' AND rvea.is_active = TRUE
JOIN   app_user rvau ON rvau.id = rvea.evaluator_user_id
WHERE  ea.attempt_type = 'PRIMARY' AND ea.status = 'FROZEN' AND rvea.status = 'NOT_ASSIGNED' AND rvea.is_active = TRUE
ORDER  BY ea.frozen_at ASC
LIMIT  500;
error: Validation failed (schema): Ambiguous column reference: 'is_active'. It exists in multiple tables (academic_unit, evaluation_attempt, app_user, script_assignment). You must qualify it with a table alias.
